name: Lavras Gold Corp.
description: Lavras Gold Corp. is a Toronto-based junior exploration company advancing the LDS Project, a multi-million-ounce gold district covering approximately 22,833 hectares near Lavras do Sul in the state of Rio Grande do Sul, southern Brazil. The company has consolidated over 1 million ounces of gold from the Butia and Cerrito deposits and has identified 24 additional gold targets across the project area. Lavras Gold is at the advanced exploration stage, conducting resource expansion drilling funded by a C$10 million public offering completed in January 2026.
